JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.MenuHint: Configure bot bridge settings and external character routing.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.ChannelKey: Shared key used to bind this Foundry world to a bot channel.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.SharedSecr: Enter the real secret value here. This is not a bot secret alias and is not resolved through the bot key manager.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.TransportM: Current bridge transport mode. Handler API works regardless of transport.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.BotBaseUrl: Optional base URL for a future bridge relay or polling transport.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.BotApiSecr: Enter the real bearer token value for the bot /api and /context endpoints. This is not a bot secret alias and is not resolved through the bot key manager.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.PlayChanne: Bot channel ID or key used for the in-Foundry play session.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.ContextLim: How many recent messages the in-Foundry GM panel loads from the bot context endpoint.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.PollInterv: How often this GM client checks the bot for pending bridge requests.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.ExternalCh: JSON array of external characters handled outside Foundry. Example: [{"characterRef":"Bob","source":"dndbeyond","characterId":"123456"}]
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.Settings.EmitChatRo: Emit chat messages for bridge rolls
When enabled, bridge-triggered rolls are also posted to Foundry chat.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.UI.ChatModeInfo: Select journals and players, then apply the session. After that, Foundry chat runs through Jenny's round engine.
JENNY_FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.UI.Placeholder: Describe what the party does, asks, or attempts.
